step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows the ZONNIC logo in navy blue, centered left on a solid white background. The C has a light teal circular halo around it, matching the Grey/Neutral flavour palette. No regulatory or additional text is present.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows the ZONNIC logo in navy blue, centered left on a solid white background. The C has a light teal circular halo around it, matching the Grey/Neutral flavour palette. No regulatory or additional text is present.
CONTENT TYPE: logo_only

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center left
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium (occupies about 30% of image width)

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: solid light teal (matches Grey/Neutral secondary_light #89d0c8)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour (on white/grey background the halo MUST be a gradient per LOGO-05)
  Gradient colours: #89d0c8
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white
  Gradient direction: not present
  Description: solid white background

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: NOT PRESENT ⚠

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold geometric sans-serif (logo only)
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: NOT PRESENT

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, light teal, white
  Flavour palette match: Grey/Neutral
  Secondary colour usage: used as accent (halo around C)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image displays the ZONNIC logo in navy blue, positioned center-left on a solid white background. The logo text is clear and uses the correct colour for a light background. The C at the end of the logo has a circular halo in light teal, matching the Grey/Neutral flavour palette, and the halo is proportionally sized and correctly placed. There are no extra shapes or outlines around the logo or halo, and the logo is not distorted or modified. However, the halo around the C is a solid colour rather than a gradient, which is required for white backgrounds. Additionally, the image is missing all regulatory elements: there is no bilingual nicotine warning at the top, no 18+ icon, and no risk communication text at the bottom. The logo’s clear space is respected, and only approved brand colours are used. Overall, the image follows most brand standards but needs to address the missing regulatory elements and update the C halo to a gradient for full compliance.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
No 18+ age restriction icon is present in the image.
No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
ZONNIC logo is present and correctly rendered in navy blue with a halo around the C.
Logo text is navy blue on a white background, which is correct.
Halo around the C is a solid colour; on white backgrounds, it must be a gradient.
Logo is not distorted, modified, or rearranged. No gradients in text, no outlines, no stacking.
Background is solid white, not a gradient or image.
No gradient background is present, so gradient direction and split do not apply.
Logo-only content on a white background is acceptable for brand visuals.
Only approved brand colours are used; halo matches Grey/Neutral palette.
Logo uses bold geometric sans-serif font, consistent with Santral. No additional text or NRT lockup present.
No grey gradient background is used.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it; no elements intrude.
Halo does not blend into background, flavour matches, logo is not placed in any shape, and no other background-specific violations.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the image.
violations.evidence: No warning text detected at the top.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ age restriction icon is present in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the 18+ icon at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements are missing from their designated positions.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top and risk communication plus 18+ icon at the bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: No bilingual nicotine warning is present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warnings at the top.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The halo around the C is a solid colour; on white backgrounds, it must be a gradient.
violations.fix_suggestion: Update the C halo to use a gradient with both primary and secondary colours.
violations.evidence: Halo is solid light teal (#89d0c8) on white background.
